programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: E67
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Talia visits Chambers Pillars, a national park established by Traditional Owners, to see how a dreaming site has been desecrated. What are the long-term implications of buffel grass devastating Central Australia's landscape?

programme.title: E85
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Jade Barker in Perth.

programme.title: E14 - Hugh De Kretser - President Of The Australian Human Rights Commission
programme.desc: Hugh de Kretser, President of the Australian Human Rights Commission addresses the National Press Club of Australia on the topic 'The Australian Human Rights Assessment 2026'.

programme.title: E86
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.desc: Parsnip performs a jaw dropping escape that will leave even Houdini speechless.

programme.desc: It's the exceptional painter, Spinach, creating Kiwi's portrait, if Kiwi can keep still.

programme.desc: Evil Pea plans to freeze Supertato into an ice cube by pretending to teach him to dance.

programme.title: E49 - Asparagus
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey to mind her manners at the table - they're not animals. But when Bluey gets her hands on a stick of magic asparagus, she shows them everyone's got a wild side.

programme.title: E23 - The Theatre Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels help to put on an amateur dramatic show.

programme.desc: When a storm washes up plastic litter onto the Academy beach, the Go Jetters leave Ubercorn, Grandmaster Glitch and the cadets behind and head to the North Pacific Ocean in Jet Pad.

programme.title: E20 - Out Of Site
programme.desc: Brenda learns that it is important to work as a team and not just care about her own jobs.

programme.title: E37 - Sleepover
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hettie with a sleepover at the museum for some of the children. They do a treasure hunt and a night-time picnic, but antics ensue when they clean up after themselves.

programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programme.title: E403 - The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution.

programme.title: E108 - The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: E119 - New Shoes
programme.desc: Peppa loses her shoes, but she gets new red ones. Now she is so happy in them, that she refuses to take them off.

programme.title: E121 - Mummy Pig's Birthday
programme.desc: It is Mummy Pig's birthday, and Peppa, George and Daddy Pig are planning a surprise.

programme.title: E403 - The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution.

programme.title: E133 - Cleaning The Car
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have to wash the car when it gets dirty.

programme.title: E135 - Camping
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go camping, but Daddy Pig is too big to get into the tent. Daddy Pig likes sleeping under the stars, until it starts to rain.

programme.title: E130 - Babysitting
programme.desc: Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig look after Peppa and George while Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig go out for the evening. Peppa and George are too excited to sleep and Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig play games with them to tire them out.

programme.title: E109 - The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: E403 - The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution.

programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E209 - The Crew Builds A Ferris Wheel / The Crew Builds A Farm Animal Yoga Space
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk! // When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.title: E413 - Side-Swiped / Quest For The Blue Bananas
programme.desc: Dora and Boots run into Swiper and his nephew Zorrito! They must make it home before Swiper and Zorrito can swipe their teddy bear. // Dora meets Boots' cousin, Sombrera, and they journey across the rainforest to find the special blue bananas!

programme.title: E122 - Barbabright Has A Secret / Super Duper Cool
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: E711 - The Yucky Ducky
programme.desc: When the Yucky Ducky covers Axle City in icky, sticky grossigoo, it's up to Special Mission Blaze to stop her machine and save the world from being grossified... forever!

programme.title: E403 - The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution.

programme.title: E119 - The Crew Builds A Giant Lemonade Stand / The Crew Builds A Wildlife Bridge
programme.desc: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! // Why does Crunchy the beaver cross the road? Because Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help him get to the other side!

programme.title: E813 - Pups Save A Show Jumper / Pups Save The Salmon
programme.desc: Winnie Winnington goes looking for a frog to enter in a frog-jumping contest and ends up needing rescued in a swamp. // The pups must help salmon get to the ocean and also need to rescue Alex who gets stuck on top of a dam.

programme.title: E106 - The Little Axolotl / Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find an adorable baby axolotl. They have to bring him home, but he keeps wandering off. // The Big Red Chicken gets stuck in a giant floating bubble and is heading straight for a volcano! Dora has to do a mid-air rescue to save him.

programme.desc: It is snowing, so Peppa and George go outside to play.

programme.desc: Peppa and George's cousin Chloe comes to their house. Peppa tries to show Chloe that she is a big girl, but it is very hard.

programme.title: E1 - Cold Start
programme.desc: Mikey links up with astronaut Chris Hadfield in space, and a landing gear collapse sends the Buffalo crew scrambling.

programme.title: E2 - Shootout
programme.desc: NHL players from the Ottawa Senators shoot pucks with Mikey and the Buffalo Airways team; and there’s panic in the cockpit when DC-3 co-pilot David navigates a bad landing.

programme.title: E1 - Yorkshire (The Nidd)
programme.desc: This multi award-winning documentary follows charismatic blind adventurer Amar Latif as he explorers one of Yorkshire’s most stunning river valleys. As a blind man with a passion for outdoor adventure, Amar abseils into a hidden canyon, canoes across a huge reservoir, visits mysterious ruins, goes fishing for trout and meets the local llamas. It’s an uplifting and life-affirming watch as this unique presenter reveals how he takes constant pleasure from the smallest things in rugged landscapes as beautiful as this.

programme.title: E5 - Don’t Look Down
programme.desc: The contestants are flown by helicopter to their next journey amidst a torrential downpour where they must cross a rope suspended one hundred feet above a deep gorge. The extreme height, and harsh camping conditions, test the teams.

programme.title: E2 - Henhouse of Horrors
programme.desc: Billy comes to the rescue at a farm where a predator is creating a horror show at a chicken coop. Then he goes way north to work with partner Terry to solve a beaver problem.

programme.title: E4 - A 300 ton-Journey
programme.desc: Super heavy, super high and super wide. Autoclaves are the names of the metal giants in which aircraft parts are to be produced from a wide variety of materials under extreme pressure and heat. But it is a long and dangerous way to get there. The two autoclaves weigh over 300 tonnes and have to be transported over a distance of 100 kilometres. A challenge that is anything but easy and involves many risks and hurdles. It is a single obstacle course. From overhead cables hanging too low at level crossings, to bridges that cannot withstand the weight, to narrow roads and steep inclines. And all this in miserable weather and slush. It is a battle for centimetres, there's not a second to lose attention, not an obstacle to be overlooked.

programme.title: Contaminated And Scarce: The Growing Fight For Clean Water
programme.desc: In the world's wettest state - Meghalaya - local communities tackle water shortages, while India's thirsty megacities use more water than can be replenished. What are the solutions?

programme.title: Inside Zaporizhzhia - A Nuclear Power Plant In The Midst Of War
programme.desc: With the Russian invasion of Ukraine, fears of a nuclear accident have returned. In the very first days of the war, Russian troops occupied the exclusion zone around what's left of Chernobyl. Shortly afterwards, they took control of Zaporizhzhia's nuclear power plant.

programme.title: Contaminated And Scarce: The Growing Fight For Clean Water
programme.desc: In the world's wettest state - Meghalaya - local communities tackle water shortages, while India's thirsty megacities use more water than can be replenished. What are the solutions?

programme.title: Cyprus And The Wars In The Middle East
programme.desc: Drone attacks cause a drop in tourism - how the wars in the Middle East are affecting Cyprus +++ Sperm donors and their many children - how Europe regulates assisted reproduction

Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Hidden Doors! Exploring The Unknown World 'Africa'
programme.desc: Aiba Masaki hosts a brand‑new overseas travel show like no other. He visits hidden places rarely introduced in Japanese media, guided by local residents, and also travels abroad to thank the people who make the everyday items we rely on. Rear Window
programme.desc: While recovering from a broken leg at home, a photographer spies on his neighbors and witnesses a crime.

programme.title: Vertigo
programme.desc: A retired detective is hired to investigate a friend's wife, only to become too close to his mark.

programme.title: Ani Wednesday: World in Pictures: Dead Dead Demons Dededede Destruction (Part 2)
programme.desc: Follows two high school friends, Koyama Kadode and Nakagawa Oran, as they navigate adulthood amidst an alien invasion

programme.title: Annette
programme.desc: The first musical written by cult band Sparks follows a romance between a stand-up comedian and a singer.

programme.title: Maria
programme.desc: A biographical drama about the final years of opera singer Maria Callas.

programme.title: Soundtrack to a Coup d'Etat
programme.desc: A visual essay about the machinations leading to the 1961 assassination of Congolese leader Patrice Lumumba.

programme.title: Blue Giant
programme.desc: A self-taught saxophone player forms a jazz trio with a piano prodigy and an amateur drummer.

programme.title: Vertigo

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Frontline of Cold War
programme.desc: The long-awaited “Cold War” series returns! Director Longman Leung together with Terrance Lau and Louise Wong disclose the untold stories of filming “Cold War 1994”. While Terrance reveals filming car chase scenes had been his brush with death, Louise confesses to being stressed to play the role of a gang boss for the first time that took her three months of preparation for the action scenes. Longman also shares about the tycoon kidnapping case in the film inspired by real cases from the 1990s......

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E210 -I Did It My Way
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Troll Factory
programme.desc: Talented yet arrogant city desk journalist Lim Sang-jin investigates corruption within the major corporation Manjun, only to have his report debunked as a hoax, leading to his integrity being questioned. “Your article wasn't false. It was a trick that we orchestrated” Then one day, a suspicious tip is sent to Lim. The mysterious whistleblower introduces himself as a member of the online opinion manipulation team known as Team Alep, which fabricated both truth and lies for the right price...Where does the truth begin and the lie end?

programme.title: Band Four
programme.desc: “Band Four” is the story of Cat aspiring to make her mark on the global music stage, while contending with the haunting absence of her father, King, a guitarist who abandoned her and her mother two decades ago. Cat's life takes a dramatic turn when her mother succumbs to illness, and King unexpectedly appears at the funeral together with Matilda, Cat's previously unknown adolescent stepsister, further complicating Cat's ongoing struggle to raise her own 9-year-old son, Riley. Forced to live together in a crowded Hong Kong flat, the newly reunited family finds itself in a vortex of conflicting personalities, insecurities, and priorities. The family finds amidst this turmoil a common communication channel via music. Just as the familial bond begins to form through their shared musical language, both their bond and Band Four's survival are put to the test by a fresh set of unforeseen challenges.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Frontline of Cold War
programme.desc: The long-awaited “Cold War” series returns! Director Longman Leung together with Terrance Lau and Louise Wong disclose the untold stories of filming “Cold War 1994”. While Terrance reveals filming car chase scenes had been his brush with death, Louise confesses to being stressed to play the role of a gang boss for the first time that took her three months of preparation for the action scenes. Longman also shares about the tycoon kidnapping case in the film inspired by real cases from the 1990s......

programme.title: Blue Giant
programme.desc: Miyamoto Dai, a student with a passion for basketball, has an overnight life-changing experience after going to a jazz show for the first time. As if hypnotised by this music he knows nothing about, the young man decides to devote himself heart and soul to the saxophone and jazz becomes his new passion. Will he succeed in becoming a great musician?

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Frontline of Cold War
programme.desc: The long-awaited “Cold War” series returns! Director Longman Leung together with Terrance Lau and Louise Wong disclose the untold stories of filming “Cold War 1994”. While Terrance reveals filming car chase scenes had been his brush with death, Louise confesses to being stressed to play the role of a gang boss for the first time that took her three months of preparation for the action scenes. Longman also shares about the tycoon kidnapping case in the film inspired by real cases from the 1990s......

programme.title: E58 - A. Little Dude/Vault of Bones/The Great Birdman/Simon & Marcy/Adventure Time: A Glitc
programme.desc: While Finn and Jake go swimming, Finn's hat magically comes to life!

programme.title: E116 - Steven's Dream/Adventures In Light Distortion/Gem Heist
programme.desc: A strange dream prompts Steven to search for answers.

programme.title: E7 - Death Punchies/Peeps/Under The Hood/Skips' Stress/Gold Watch
programme.desc: Tired of Mordecai always beating him at punchies and getting his way, Rigby decides to learn the martial art of 'Death Kwon Do'.

programme.title: E111 - Villain Time/What Rhymes With Omnitrix?/A Sticky Situation/Vin Diagram/Riding The Sto
programme.desc: Ben must turn alien to save the Hoover Dam from disaster, but when tough guy hero Tim Buktu swoops in to 'help', Ben must figure out if Tim is friend or foe.

programme.title: E432 - Lamput Docs And Robot/The Docs Express/Clowning Around
programme.desc: Lamput is stuck in the lab with a dangerous robot on the loose! It’s up to the combined effort of the two Docs and the entire Lab team to save him before it is too late.

programme.title: E42 - Doorway To Adventure
programme.desc: Amato and his friends discover a pair of robot doors with the ability to open a two-way portal, then find themselves stranded on a remote island. Now, they need to use their wits to make it back before class ends.

programme.title: E129 - The Heist/The Petals/The Nuisance/The Best/The Worst
programme.desc: Richard's got a motorcycle helmet stuck on his head, so when he goes into a bank the terrified staff all assume he's there to rob the place and hand over a load of cash. Richard leaves with the money, completely oblivious to the fact he's just performed a stick-up. Nicole and the kids soon tell him what he's done and try to figure out a way to avoid the police manhunt and return the cash.

programme.title: E3 - Crowded Seas
programme.desc: Dip into North America’s southern coastal waters, where opalescent squid mate, sea turtles nest, and mobula rays take flight for the sake of romance. Fly a specialized drone with Lizzie as she swoops in for a breath sample from a blue whale.

programme.title: E3 - Collar Complications
programme.desc: Rejoin the team for some post-rainy-season drama as they search for Ferinha, Fera, and Badalo, whose tracking collars are missing. Meet a new biologist who helps Lizzie recollar the jaguars, adding a high-tech device that will record even more data.

programme.title: E3 - Crowded Seas
programme.desc: Dip into North America’s southern coastal waters, where opalescent squid mate, sea turtles nest, and mobula rays take flight for the sake of romance. Fly a specialized drone with Lizzie as she swoops in for a breath sample from a blue whale.

programme.title: E4 - Namaqualand: the Desert Bloom
programme.desc: For most of the year it’s a desert, but during early August and September the dusty valleys of Namaqualand transform into a wonderland carpeted with wildflowers. Witness this magnificent transformation from arid desert to beautiful oasis.

programme.title: E1 - Into the Heat
programme.desc: Meet the unlikely collaborators working to ensure mutual survival in the Kalahari Basin. Learn of an elephant clan’s symbiotic link to fruiting anaboom trees, a meerkat’s alliance with a feisty drongo bird, and more flora-and-fauna odd couples.

programme.title: E3 - Crowded Seas
programme.desc: Dip into North America’s southern coastal waters, where opalescent squid mate, sea turtles nest, and mobula rays take flight for the sake of romance. Fly a specialized drone with Lizzie as she swoops in for a breath sample from a blue whale.

programme.title: E3 - Crowded Seas
programme.desc: Dip into North America’s southern coastal waters, where opalescent squid mate, sea turtles nest, and mobula rays take flight for the sake of romance. Fly a specialized drone with Lizzie as she swoops in for a breath sample from a blue whale.

programme.title: E4 - The Queen is Back
programme.desc: Feel the heat as Lizzie and veterinarian Joares scramble to collar more jaguars amid storms, floods, and power outages. Try to pin down the elusive Badalo before his data-gathering tag drops off and meet a new female the team is eager to study.

programme.title: E1 - The Rescuers
programme.desc: Dogs around the world come to the rescue in surprising ways. Some search for survivors when disaster strikes or rescue animals from poachers and wildlife traffickers. Others help us in times of trouble—both on land and in the water.

programme.title: E4 - Hawaii
programme.desc: Get ready to understand the science behind Hawaii's stunning beaches. Why does sand appear white, yellow, black, green and red? How do active volcanoes change the coastline? Are other forces at play in shaping these incredible beaches?

programme.title: E3 - Crowded Seas
programme.desc: Dip into North America’s southern coastal waters, where opalescent squid mate, sea turtles nest, and mobula rays take flight for the sake of romance. Fly a specialized drone with Lizzie as she swoops in for a breath sample from a blue whale.

programme.title: E2 - Pushed to the Limits
programme.desc: Thirst for rain alongside the animals of the Kalahari, as they endure a brutally dry year. Witness co-operation between elephant herds in their desperate search for water and meet a meerkat’s strange babysitter, who helps the next generation survive.

programme.title: E15 - Finale
programme.desc: It’s the final showdown and the top three chefs must create the best four course meal of their lives. And if the pressure isn't already high enough, Tom reveals in a twisted turn of events only two chefs will get the chance to serve their full menu. The internationally star-studded table of diners includes Deputy Editor of FOOD & WINE Magazine Melanie Hansche, acclaimed chefs Mitsuharu Tsumura, Alexander Smalls, Dan Hong, May Chow, and Alvin Leung, along with Tom, Padma, Nilou and Graham. In one of the most competitive contests of artistry and skill, only one chef will emerge victorious and be named Top Chef.

programme.desc: Once upon a time, a long long time ago, men and gorillas were inseparable cousins. But they grew apart, one living in the bush and the other in a village. And all because of the gorilla's pride and stupidity.

programme.desc: Pokou starts her second challenge. N'zi and Lucio advance towards a group of small huts. A little girl comes out of one of the huts and jumps into Lucio's arms.

programme.title: The Specialist
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone and Sharon Stone star in this hard-edged thriller about an ex-CIA explosives expert (Stallone) who helps a seductive beauty (Stone) avenge the murder of her parents by a powerful Cuban-American crime boss.

programme.desc: In one of the most beloved sci-fi horror classics ever, a mysterious amphibious monster escapes captivity in order to be with a scientist’s beautiful female lab assistant.

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Discovery & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E1 - JJ's Yummy Food & Clean-Up Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy food & clean-up fun with JJ! First, learn about all types of pasta & make some from scratch in Grandma's kitchen. Then, Cody's Dad shows how fun & tasty healthy eating can be with delicious sliced fruit. After all the fun, it's time to clean up! JJ's family gives Bingo a scrub in the tub after he gets dirty playing outside, & all the kids chip in to wash a filthy firetruck. It's fun to make a mess, & even more fun to clean up!

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Ultimate Pretend Play Day!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate pretend play day with JJ! When the cookies go missing, it's up to Detective JJ & his sidekick Bingo to follow the clues & solve the case. Then, when JJ gets nervous on his first carousel ride, Mom helps him unlock his imagination & he becomes a brave knight on a valiant steed! The pretend play continues as Captain JJ & first mate YoYo set sail on the high seas to find a lost sock. From playing chef to being a Turtle Scout, you can be anything!

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Ultimate Pretend Play Day!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate pretend play day with JJ! When the cookies go missing, it's up to Detective JJ & his sidekick Bingo to follow the clues & solve the case. Then, when JJ gets nervous on his first carousel ride, Mom helps him unlock his imagination & he becomes a brave knight on a valiant steed! The pretend play continues as Captain JJ & first mate YoYo set sail on the high seas to find a lost sock. From playing chef to being a Turtle Scout, you can be anything!

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E423
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: E3 - Good For Nothing
programme.desc: 20-Squad must leap into action when Yakuza assassins descend on L.A., targeting a number of mysterious Japanese ex-pats. Meanwhile, Nichelle finds her job on the line at the inspector general's office when a colleague accuses her of taking bribes.

programme.title: E7 - The Mickey
programme.desc: On Celina's last day as a rookie, John gives her one final test. Meanwhile, Bailey makes a new friend, and Lucy places her faith in Seth for an undercover assignment.

programme.title: E3 - Nothing Sudden About It
programme.desc: An American teenager disappears from a party during her senior year trip to Portugal.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: Season 2 of NCIS: Origins delves deeper into the unstoppable NCIS Camp Pendleton team led by the legendary Mike Franks, as well as Gibbs' early career as a special agent, and reveals the fate of Lala after last season's devastating car crash.

programme.title: E93
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E53 - Singapore Laksa Soup In Aubusson
programme.desc: In Creuse, Alessandra Montagne meets Diana, a Singaporean chef who revisits recipes from her ancestors in her restaurant. On today's menu: laksa soup, an iconic Singaporean dish made with spicy broth, coconut milk, noodles, chicken, and Vietnamese coriander.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: E17 - Sacred Send-Offs
programme.desc: Since the dawn of humanity, rituals have marked our passage from life to death. From the burials of biblical heroes to prehistoric mummification, we delve into the origins of these sacred customs.

programme.title: E2 - Phantom Wreck
programme.desc: After finding an American coin at Le Chameau's wreck site, Jeff MacKinnon must choose to either-stay the course or chase a new mystery.

programme.title: E10 - Bear Down
programme.desc: Lauro continues his quest to complete the Iditarod through the interior of Alaska. Bret and Ivy pursue a bear into dangerously steep terrain. Daniel sets traps for wolves to protect the deer population.

programme.title: E1 - Black Sites
programme.desc: What lies beneath? David Duchovny takes us into the top-secret government bases and the clandestine operations they were built to conceal. Discover a deadly poison lab, a nuclear missile site and more.

programme.title: 鐵窗生涯: 吉隆坡半山芭監獄
programme.desc: Situated in prime real estate and slated for demolition, revisit Malaysia's most infamous prison through the eyes of its most colourful characters.

programme.title: E7 - Champions Of Breakfast
programme.desc: Will Kellogg is on top of the cereal industry after beating out Post, but now, the king of cereal has met his match with a young flour mill executive. A decades-long war for dominance ensues.

programme.title: E25 - Real Life Monsters
programme.desc: For centuries, fantastic tales of terrifying monsters have fascinated mankind. Bizarre beasts of all shapes and sizes have been portrayed in some of history's most classic stories and folklore.

programme.title: 鐵窗生涯: 吉隆坡半山芭監獄
programme.desc: Situated in prime real estate and slated for demolition, revisit Malaysia's most infamous prison through the eyes of its most colourful characters.

programme.title: E10 - Bear Down
programme.desc: Lauro continues his quest to complete the Iditarod through the interior of Alaska. Bret and Ivy pursue a bear into dangerously steep terrain. Daniel sets traps for wolves to protect the deer population.

programme.title: E10 - Bear Down
programme.desc: Lauro continues his quest to complete the Iditarod through the interior of Alaska. Bret and Ivy pursue a bear into dangerously steep terrain. Daniel sets traps for wolves to protect the deer population.

programme.title: E10 - Bear Down

programme.title: E10 - Bear Down
programme.desc: Lauro continues his quest to complete the Iditarod through the interior of Alaska. Bret and Ivy pursue a bear into dangerously steep terrain. Daniel sets traps for wolves to protect the deer population.

programme.title: Racing On The Edge S6 E1
The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: Eyes-Closed Friday
programme.desc: Humans would be so much easier to invade from above if they didn't look at the sky, so Teresa creates a brand new superstition that has everyone closing their eyes for one hour on Friday.

programme.title: Mosaic Madness
programme.desc: Doki accidentally breaks Anabella's vintage tea tray and she's mad. Doki wants to make it up to her, but how can he fix her broken tea tray? The team heads to Istanbul, Turkey, where a ‘puzzle solving pro' is putting together fragments of an ancient ruin.

programme.title: Cracking the Cipher
programme.desc: By shifting the alphabet or replacing one letter for another further down the sequence, a coded message can be deciphered. In this episode, Eric uses the trick to crack an ancient box used by Roman Emperor Julius Caesar. Can you do the same?

programme.title: Broken
programme.desc: It's not good news for Chase, who heads to the hospital after suffering an injury at the gym and has a nervous wait to find out how long he'll be out of action. And Acro duo Dylan and Lola join the Acro squad for their first big international competition in Portugal.

programme.title: Overcoming Fears
programme.desc: Sam and Morgan operate on Gandalf the falcon's lumpy foot. And the Junior Vets are about to find out what real vet work is all about. But will Saira overcome her fear of big dogs to help stray hound Jessie, who needs life-changing surgery?

programme.title: The Era of the Air Pump
programme.desc: Eric makes a rocket from a plastic bottle and some cardboard. Then he uses an air pump to cause a transfer of energy that is strong enough to launch the rocket into the sky.

programme.title: Banquet
programme.desc: Howler and Dove are invited to Lord Roach's banquet. But banquets come with all kinds of rules and regulations, exposing the greedier guests in the room! Hardened foodies, they indulge in all kinds of scheming.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Trip to Iceland
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing a game that uses family names. Alim joins them, but it turns out that he doesn't have a surname. And he is far from being the only one. Our heroes will probably understand this better if they visit Alim's penfriend Gunnar in Iceland.

programme.title: Bugged
programme.desc: Robbie buys a bottle of pheromone-based aftershave, hoping it will make him popular with girls at a party he's planning to go to; but the scent makes him popular with the local bug population instead.

programme.title: Troubadours and Minstrels
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, listening to music for entertainment is a much-appreciated pastime. Singers and musicians of that era travel round Europe singing their poetry. Famous minstrel Howler is a huge hit at a fiery banquet in his lordship's court.

programme.title: Bucket
programme.desc: No place to sit? Do not worry, we have the most creative solution for you!

programme.title: The Mystery of the Maleficent Mosquitoes
programme.desc: When swarms of mosquitoes mysteriously descend on the park, the kids' summer movie night is in danger of being cancelled unless Addison and her friends can figure out a way to stop them.

programme.title: Tablecloth
programme.desc: Let's turn the tablecloth into something festive!

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: The pursuit of the cunning salmon turns into a voyage from the ocean through the river to the spring.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery find a sick crayfish and try to find him a new home with clean water before it's too late.

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery find a sick crayfish and try to find him a new home with clean water before it's too late.

programme.title: Big in Japan
programme.desc: Flippy and Motor record a video parody of a song from a teen duo, hoping to annoy the singers' fans. But their version accidentally becomes a hit itself, and they find their musical integrity compromised by their sudden popularity.

programme.title: The Bare Bird Bath
programme.desc: Kea's bird bath keeps running out of water, and after investigating the problem, Darwin and Newts discover that it's evaporating in the sun.

programme.title: Explosive Spots!
programme.desc: The doctors get snotted in Ouchology, we meet new Oucher Isaac, and join an incredible emergency service at work in Australia, the Flying Doctors!

programme.title: Melissa Millett: Amazing Pets
programme.desc: Melissa trained her dog and cat to become a record-breaking duo. She shares with Alan Pixsley the fundamentals of animal training and what it takes to become the very best. But what will be the one thing that Alan can learn from Melissa and his new furry friends?

programme.title: Explosive Spots!

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. programme.title: Power Lunch

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. programme.desc: When Lincoln wants to watch the finale of his favorite show, he has to beat each sister to get to the couch first! // After Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, he realizes he has to erase it before Lori hears it.

programme.title: E121 - The Loudest Yard / Raw Deal
programme.desc: When Lincoln’s mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot. // After Lucy reads Lincoln’s fortune and claims his day will “end in disaster”, Lincoln becomes a hypochondriac.

programme.title: E208 - Dubu / Jack's Day Off
programme.desc: Halmoni falls in love with a customer's dog. Rather than return him, she dog-naps him and goes on the lam! // Jack volunteers to run the Groom & Board solo, but when a pet snake causes chaos he must protect the other pets from the jaws of death!

programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina go undercover to investigate a corrupt novelty product factory. // The Patrick Show presents the 'Roast of Patrick Star'.

programme.title: E239 - iSpace Out
programme.desc: A quirky billionaire asks Carly and her friends to put on the first live Web show from outer space, so they undergo tests for space travel. Meanwhile, a strange little girl visits Spencer at the loft.

programme.title: E283 - Ma and Pa's Big Hurrah / Yellow Pavement
programme.desc: When SpongeBob's parents come to visit, their thirst for thrills comes as a big surprise. // You'll learn all you need to get your boating license in this educational driving film.

programme.title: E284 - The Flower Plot / SpongeBob on Parade
programme.desc: The Chum Bucket is replaced by a flower shop with a charming new owner. // The Krusty Krab enters a float in the annual Bikini Bottom Parade.

programme.title: E102 - Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: E112 - Bad Eggs / Out of Bounds
programme.desc: Best ruins Bester's painting by accident so in order to avoid hurting her feelings he blames an innocent chicken. // Having lost their soccer ball over the garden fence, the twins have no option but to find a way to get it back.

E3
programme.desc: Jamie shares a simple salmon dish perfect for a midweek meal, and some no-fuss fish cakes made from tins. He cooks a lamb Madras traybake, as well as a no-cook pasta sauce, and crowns it all off with a hot and crispy ice cream parcel!

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: Graham Norton presents a lively chat show featuring Keira Knightley, Malala Yousafzai, Aimee Lou Wood, Chris McCausland and Hozier.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Jamie shares a simple salmon dish perfect for a midweek meal, and some no-fuss fish cakes made from tins. He cooks a lamb Madras traybake, as well as a no-cook pasta sauce, and crowns it all off with a hot and crispy ice cream parcel!

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: The remaining junior bakers must go global - having their skills tested in tricky international challenges. The pressure is on in the technical challenge.

programme.desc: Joining Graham on his sofa are Robert De Niro, Mikey Madison, Alan Carr and Holly Willoughby. Brandi Carlile joins Elton John for a special performance in the studio.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E53
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E1 - 36歲全職寶媽的求職現狀
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E1 - 36歲全職寶媽的求職現狀

programme.title: E4 - 楊宗緯催淚獻唱
programme.desc: 全新互動音樂節目，以「星素結合」的形式全民共唱。100位素人歌手將通過現場K歌贏得機會成為三位幸運歌手，與每集的大咖歌手進行合唱挑戰，實現自己的夢想。大咖歌手嘉賓包括孫楠、羽泉等。

programme.title: E8 - 東北冰雪遊戲大亂鬥
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E15 - 同頻比心動更重要
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

E23
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: The Top Bet
programme.desc: Do Do is everything Anita is not. Do Do is the brash, uncouth kind of a fishwife, while Anita is the personification of elegance, intellect and perfect deportment. Do Do works at a fish store but hopes to be a clairvoyant but Anita has this extra-sensory perception power by birth. Uncle's enterprise is in danger as top gambler Sung issues a challenge. Uncle asks Anita to take on Sung but she refuses. In desperation, Uncle goes to Do Do who playfully claims to be the ESP queen of gamblers...
